profile.name: Pedro
profile.title: DevOps Engineer  | AWS | Octopus |  Bamboo |  EKS | New Relic | Splunk | Typescript  | Bash | PowerShell
profile.description:
• AWS Proficiency:  4 years of experience with Amazon Web Services (AWS), including EC2, EKS, S3, IAM, Lambda, Batch, DynamoDB, and CloudFormation.  

• Continuous Integration/Deployment: Proven experience in administering and building development CI pipelines of moderate complexity. Skilled in setting up build plans, assisting developers with failures, managing software configurations, and ensuring successful end-to-end deployments. Proficient in automating AWS resource provisioning and providing input on cloud environment setup and implementation plans, with CI/CD technologies such as Atlassian Bamboo, Octopus Deploy, MSBuild, Sonar, GIT, and Docker.  

• Scripting and Automation Skills: Moderate experience with Typescript, Bash, Powershell, Python, and XML/JSON.  

• Web Technologies:  REST APIs, Single Page Applications (SPA), HTTP Get and Post methods. 
 
• Experienced Systems Administrator: Proven experience in Linux Administration, Windows Administration, and IIS Management.  

• Technical Support and Troubleshooting: Skilled in supporting developers with server troubleshooting and resolving application errors due to environmental issues. Proficient in debugging production outages, performing root cause analysis, and taking corrective actions to maintain system stability and uptime. Experienced in monitoring production environments and ensuring systems remain stable and operational. 

• Developer Tool Support: Proficient in setting up development tools to facilitate application development, including configuring Git repositories and monitoring tools for developers.  Excellent Communication: Verbal and written communication skills in both English and Spanish.

location.notes: Autocompleted using Google Maps API (id: ChIJkWK-FBFsEg0RSFb-HGIY8DQ)

interestingFacts.fact:
I love disassembling electronic devices, testing circuits and finding shorts. 
Making modifications and repairs with the soldering station.

challenges.description:
• Full-Scale EKS Migration: Spearheaded the transition of an entire AWS account from Linux EC2 to Amazon EKS, decoupling services and designing secure Cross-Account IAM strategies to maintain legacy resource access.

• Containerization & Orchestration: Standardized application packaging with Docker and utilized Helm to fetch and manage repository-based configurations, ensuring consistent and scalable deployments across clusters.

• Modernized CI/CD Pipelines: Re-engineered Bamboo and Octopus Deploy workflows to support containerized architectures, resolving legacy bottlenecks and automating the full build-to-cluster deployment cycle.

• Infrastructure Optimization: Maximized operational efficiency by implementing AWS Warm Pools and developing Lambda functions for automated node patching and environment maintenance.

•AWS Infrastructure Management: Managed core services including S3, EC2, Lambda, Batch, IAM, and DynamoDB, ensuring high availability and security compliance.

•Infrastructure as Code: Developed and maintained CloudFormation templates to automate environment provisioning and AWS stack management.

• CI/CD: Orchestrated full deployment pipelines using Bamboo and Octopus Deploy, optimizing build and release workflows.

• Reliability & Troubleshooting: Restored service stability by performing deep-dive troubleshooting of unhealthy stacks and server configurations.
⚡ NodeJS, Express, Mongoose, Mongo, GraphQL,  ⚡ .net 5, Entity Framework, SQL Server,  ⚡ Heroku, Amazon, Azure
⚡ Collaborate and develop code with open source projects such as www.codepaster.net as a training purpose. ⚡ Pair-Programing with others collaborators.

⚡ React - Angular - Vuejs - d3js - Flexbox - CSS Grid - Material Design - CSS in JS - Gatsby ⚡ GraphQL - lodash/fp - Webpack - Parcel - ES6/ES7 - Typescript - Git ⚡ Code quality and unit testing: TDD, Jest, React Testing Library, Jest + Typescript ⚡ Security: cookies - headers - JWT.
⚡ Functional programming fundamentals - Variables and data type - Functions and events ⚡ Algorithms - Arrays and loops - Asynchronous call handling

• Collaboration in the extension Project of 6 new holes. Construction and grow-in supervision.  • Improvement the health of the course and surface of play. • Interviewed staff to join the team. • Optimize the agronomic and yearly job planning. • Optimize resources  - Budget control. • Problem solving, control and management.
• Helping in 5 differents courses with the regular maintenance tasks.

• Supervise and coordinate course setup daily. • Detection and resolution of irrigation problems, control and management.  • Small workgroup leadership. • Daily reports on possible improvements identified in the course.

• Assign and supervise jobs for a team of up to 35 people. • Supervise and coordinate course setup daily. • Small workgroup leadership. • Supervise staff schedule. • Control, supervise and management of machinery and facilities
• Operating all machinery and tools • Irrigation control and management. • Preparation and sprayer application. • Cultural practices; aerification, tine, verticut, topdress, roll...

I would like to have a career with growth and to be able to move into different positions.
